description: Create domain-architecture comparison figure and evidence matrix artifact
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd

# Domain architecture comparison (from UniProt P40121 vs P06396)
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2,1, figsize=(10,3.2), sharex=True)

def draw(ax, length, repeats, sever_region, title, color):
    ax.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((0,0.3), length, 0.4, fc='#eeeeee', ec='k'))
    for name,s,e in repeats:
        ax.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((s,0.3), e-s, 0.4, fc=color, ec='k'))
        ax.text((s+e)/2, 0.5, name, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8)
    if sever_region:
        s,e = sever_region
        ax.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((s,0.72), e-s, 0.12, fc='red', ec='k'))
        ax.text((s+e)/2, 0.9, 'annotated actin-severing region', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='red')
    ax.set_xlim(0,800); ax.set_ylim(0,1.1); ax.set_yticks([])
    ax.set_title(title, fontsize=10, loc='left')

draw(axes[0], 348, [("G1",27,75),("G2",148,188),("G3",261,307)], None,
     "CAPG / CapG (P40121) — 348 aa, 38.5 kDa, 3 gelsolin repeats — CAPS but does NOT sever", "#4c9be8")
draw(axes[1], 782, [("G1",76,158),("G2",198,270),("G3",317,389),("G4",455,536),("G5",576,642),("G6",681,756)],
     (53,176), "Gelsolin (P06396) — 782 aa, 85.7 kDa, 6 gelsolin repeats — caps AND severs", "#e8a04c")
axes[1].set_xlabel("residue")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("capg_vs_gelsolin_domains.png", dpi=130)
print("saved figure")

# Evidence matrix table
rows = [
 ["1322908","direct assay (recombinant + native)","refutes","CapG severs filaments","'reversibly blocks the barbed ends of actin filaments but does not sever preformed actin filaments'","human MCP in E.coli + rabbit alveolar macrophage","High; this is the annotation's own cited ref"],
 ["7851883","review/structural","refutes","CapG severs filaments","'Unlike all other members of this family, Cap G caps the barbed ends...but does not sever them'; 3 vs 6 repeats","human CAPG gene","High"],
 ["2255912","direct assay","refutes","gCap39/CapG severs","'gCap39 does not sever actin filaments'","recombinant + purified protein","High"],
 ["UniProt P40121/P06396","structural/evolutionary (computational)","qualifies","domain basis","CapG=3 repeats(G1-G3),38.5kDa; gelsolin=6 repeats,severing region 53-176; CapG lacks G4-G6","sequence features","High"],
]
df = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=["Citation","EvidenceType","Direction","ClaimTested","KeyFinding","Context","Confidence"])
df.to_csv("capg_evidence_matrix.csv", index=False)
print(df.to_string(index=False))
